mode.label: Coverage detail
mode.description: How much road and address data to include alongside admin boundaries

full.label: Full
full.description: Streets + addresses + interpolation + admin + postcodes. Largest, most complete.

no-addresses.label: No addresses
no-addresses.description: Streets + interpolation + admin + postcodes. No house-number resolution.

admin.label: Admin only
admin.description: Admin boundaries + place nodes + postcodes. No streets or addresses.

admin-minimal.label: Admin minimal
admin-minimal.description: Admin boundaries + place nodes only — no postcodes, no postal polygons. Smallest possible deployable. Country/state/city + cities500-equivalent place names.

quality.label: Boundary precision
quality.description: Higher quality = sharper admin polygon edges but larger download. Default q2.5 is invisible at typical photo-GPS accuracy.

poi_tier.label: Points of interest
poi_tier.description: Landmarks, parks, museums, peaks, airports, etc.

major.label: Major (~900K POIs)
major.description: Airports, national parks, palaces, train stations, UNESCO sites, volcanoes.

notable.label: Notable (~3M POIs)
notable.description: + museums, castles, stadiums, beaches, waterfalls, universities, viewpoints.

all.label: All (~5.9M POIs)
all.description: Every named POI (places of worship, peaks, memorials, artwork, gardens).

constraints.message: Admin minimal mode is only built at q2.5 — the whole point is the smallest possible deployable.

presets.label: Smallest useful
presets.description: Admin boundaries + cities500-level place names, no POIs.

presets.label: Immich recommended
presets.description: Admin + major POIs (airports, parks, palaces). Best balance for photo apps.

presets.label: With street addresses
presets.description: Streets + addresses + interpolation. House-number resolution where tagged.

presets.label: Maximum quality
presets.description: Full mode at uncapped boundary precision. Largest configuration available.
